result.summary: The page is largely well-constructed with no critical visual breaks. However, there are minor accessibility and readability concerns with the small print at the bottom of the page.

issues.description: The terms and conditions text at the bottom of the yellow section is extremely small (appears to be less than 10px) and dense, making it difficult to read and potentially inaccessible for users with vision impairments
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of the fine print to at least 12px or provide a toggleable 'Read More' section to display terms clearly without cluttering the page

issues.description: The small text in the terms section appears cramped and lacks sufficient line-height spacing, which reduces readability
issues.suggestion: Add more line-height (1.5 or greater) and adjust font size to improve readability of legal text
